Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-23-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy Pritikin, Esq. and John C. Fish, Jr., Esq. of 433-1940, for plaintiffs Bill Graham Enterprises, Inc. amd SFX Entertainment, Inc., moving for preliminary injunction
Robert Van Nest, Esq. of KEKER & VAN NEST 391-5400, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiffs Bill Graham Enterprises, Inc. amd SFX Entertainment, Inc.'s application for Order to show cause re: Preliminary Injunction -- Denied. The harm to defendants in granting the injunction outweighs the harm to plaintiffs in denying it. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
